name: Northbridge Wealth
brandVoice: Conservative, educational, long-view. Speaks like a wealth advisor at a boutique private bank who is having a thoughtful conversation with a client about their portfolio over coffee. Avoids urgency. Avoids speculation framing. Explains rather than instructs. Always frames market events in terms of long-term wealth preservation and portfolio risk, not short-term trade ideas.
audienceProfile: High-net-worth retail and family-office clients of a Canadian wealth-management firm. They are looking for context and education, not trading signals. They care about preserving capital across decades, not catching weekly moves.
brandPositioning: A multi-generational private wealth manager focused on long-horizon capital preservation. We help our clients understand markets so they can sleep at night, not so they can trade tomorrow morning.
